data.title: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section with prior-art search framework
data.description:
Update CLAUDE.md architecture section to document the prior-art search framework.

Add to the architecture section:
- Location: plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/prior-art-search.md
- Integration points: fix-bug Step 6, review-fix-dispatch.md, task-execution.md
- Trust validation gate: hard blockers (open bugs, CI failures) → untrusted; soft signals → trusted
- Tiered search: project docs → narrow GitHub ~6 calls → broad outcome ~10 calls → user escalation
- Eval: plugins/dso/skills/shared/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml (9 scenarios)

Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting.

File Impact:
- CLAUDE.md (edit)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references prior-art-search framework - Verify: grep -q prior-art-search CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md lists integration points - Verify: grep -q 'fix-bug.*review-fix-dispatch\|task-execution.*prior-art' CLAUDE.md
